description_long: This is a stone obelisk mounted on a square, tiered pedestal, set atop a broad, weathered stone platform. The shaft of the obelisk is slender and rises vertically, capped with a decorative capital featuring carved motifs. The base is robust, with a central plinth supporting the column and a square foundation bordered by a slightly raised edge. The front face of the pedestal displays an inscription plaque, while the other sides are plain. The surface shows signs of aging, with moss and discoloration visible on the platform, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure.
description: A tall, slender stone obelisk on a square, tiered pedestal with a weathered stone platform and a decorative capital. The front features an inscription plaque, and the base shows moss and aging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the inscription plaque on the pedestal and the full square platform with visible moss and weathering.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain side of the pedestal and the obelisk shaft, with the platform's edge and some moss visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned back of the pedestal and the obelisk, with the square platform clearly outlined.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain side of the pedestal and the platform, with less visible moss compared to the front.
attribute_inscription: There is a visible inscription plaque on the front face of the pedestal, featuring engraved text in a serif style. The text is partially legible and appears to be in English.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative carved motifs are present at the capital of the obelisk, just below the tip, featuring classical patterns. The rest of the shaft and pedestal are plain.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of a broad, square stone platform with a slightly raised border, supporting a tiered pedestal with a central plinth. The platform shows weathering and moss growth.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is capped with a decorative capital featuring carved motifs, transitioning from the shaft to a slightly ornate top. The very tip is flat and unadorned.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a square stone platform with visible moss and weathering; no other surrounding features are present.
